task_completion.description: Navigate to the Attribute Set window and initiate a new record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere 'Attribute Set' window is open in the Firefox browser and a blank form for a new record is visible.

task_completion.description: Enter the Search Key, Name, and Description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Search Key' (or 'Value') field contains 'SER_LOT_TRACK', the 'Name' field contains 'Serialized Lot Tracking', and the 'Description' field contains 'Attribute set for products requiring serial number and lot number tracking with 365-day guarantee'.

task_completion.description: Enable Serial No and Lot tracking
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes for 'Serial No' and 'Lot' are checked/enabled in the Attribute Set form.
The 'Guarantee Days' numeric input field contains the value '365'.

task_completion.description: Enable Instance Attribute and set Mandatory Type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Instance Attribute' checkbox is checked, and the 'Mandatory Type' dropdown is set to 'Not Mandatory' (or the equivalent empty/unselected state if that represents Not Mandatory in the UI).

task_completion.description: Save the new Attribute Set record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Record Saved' confirmation message is visible in the status bar, or the save icon is greyed out indicating the current form state has been successfully saved to the database.

integrity.description: Agent used the Firefox browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show actual interaction with the iDempiere web interface in Firefox, rather than terminal windows executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent is logged into the correct iDempiere client and role
integrity.visual_evidence: The top right corner or user profile section of the iDempiere interface shows the user logged in as 'GardenAdmin' and/or the client as 'GardenWorld'.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open, and the UI elements appear native to the iDempiere theme without injected HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target table is M_AttributeSet. The Search Key (Value field) must be 'SER_LOT_TRACK'. The Name must be 'Serialized Lot Tracking'. The Guarantee Days must be exactly 365. The task requires checking the boxes for Serial No (IsSerNo), Lot (IsLot), and Instance Attribute (IsInstanceAttribute).
